file_content:
{
  "name": "psc-sre-automacao-agent",
  "version": "2.2.3",
  "description": "psc-sre-automacao-agent in node with expressjs",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://fontes.intranet.bb.com.br/psc/psc-sre-automacao-agent/psc-sre-automacao-agent.git"
  },
  "license": "ISC",
  "author": "Equipe DS",
  "main": "dist/server.js",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc && tsoa spec",
    "debug": "tsc && node --inspect=9229 dist/server.js",
    "lint": "tsc --noEmit && eslint . --quiet --fix --resolve-plugins-relative-to .",
    "start": "node dist/server.js",
    "dev": "tsc && tsoa spec && nodemon",
    "test": "jest",
    "test:watch": "jest --watch",
    "test:coverage": "jest --coverage",
    "unitTest": "jest --testPathPattern=ut.test\\.ts$",
    "integrationTest": "jest --testPathPattern=it.test\\.ts$ --detectOpenHandles --forceExit --passWithNoTests"
  },
  "jest": {
    "collectCoverage": true,
    "coverageDirectory": "coverage/typescript",
    "coverageReporters": ["json", "html", "lcov"],
    "moduleFileExtensions": ["ts", "tsx", "js", "jsx", "json", "node"],
    "setupFiles": ["<rootDir>/src/__tests__/.envTest.js"],
    "testEnvironment": "node",
    "testPathIgnorePatterns": ["<rootDir>/node_modules/", "<rootDir>/dist/", "<rootDir>/src/__tests__/__mocks__/"],
    "testRegex": "(/__tests__/.*|(\\.|/)(test|spec))\\.(tsx?)$",
    "testResultsProcessor": "jest-sonar-reporter",
    "transform": {
      "^.+\\.tsx?$": "ts-jest"
    },
    "moduleNameMapper": {
      "^@kubernetes/client-node$": "<rootDir>/src/__tests__/__mocks__/kubernetes-client-node.mock.ts"
    },
    "verbose": true
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@kubernetes/client-node": "^1.4.0",
    "@labbsr0x/express-monitor": "2.11.0",
    "body-parser": "1.20.3",
    "cors": "2.8.5",
    "date-fns": "^3.6.0",
    "dev-express-b5-monitor": "^1.0.0",
    "dev-javascript-erro": "2.1.0",
    "dev-typescript-libs": "1.2.2",
    "express": "4.21.2",
    "express-request-id": "3.0.0",
    "fastify": "^5.7.4",
    "jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.3",
    "pino": "^9.3.2",
    "pino-http": "10.2.0",
    "pino-pretty": "^11.2.2",
    "prom-client": "^15.1.3",
    "reflect-metadata": "0.2.2",
    "sequelize": "6.37.5",
    "sequelize-typescript": "2.1.6",
    "swagger-jsdoc": "6.2.8",
    "swagger-ui-express": "5.0.1",
    "tedious": "18.3.0",
    "tsoa": "6.4.0",
    "uuid": "10.0.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@faker-js/faker": "^8.4.1",
    "@types/cors": "2.8.17",
    "@types/dockerode": "3.3.31",
    "@types/express": "4.17.21",
    "@types/jest": "^29.5.12",
    "@types/jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.10",
    "@types/node": "22.1.0",
    "@types/supertest": "^6.0.2",
    "@types/swagger-jsdoc": "6.0.4",
    "@types/swagger-ui-express": "4.1.6",
    "@types/uuid": "10.0.0",
    "@types/validator": "13.12.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "8.0.1",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "8.0.1",
    "eslint": "8.57.0",
    "eslint-config-airbnb-base": "15.0.0",
    "eslint-config-prettier": "9.1.0",
    "eslint-plugin-import": "2.29.1",
    "eslint-plugin-prettier": "5.2.1",
    "jest": "^29.7.0",
    "jest-sonar-reporter": "2.0.0",
    "nodemon": "3.1.4",
    "prettier": "3.3.3",
    "supertest": "^7.0.0",
    "testcontainers": "10.11.0",
    "ts-jest": "^29.2.4",
    "typescript": "5.5.4"
  }
}
